City Park Gaming and Brew Room


Private Rentals


Rentals- Private Parties, Gaming Events, Work Functions, Birthday Parties, Party Parties, Band Rehearsals

~Available days: Sunday, Monday, Tuesday

~49 Person indoor capacity

~Indoor seating approx. 40 people

~Outdoor seating approx. 20 people

~$100 per hour

~4 hour minimum

~$250 drink minimum.

~BYOFood/ Caterer

~No outside beverages

~1 staff member provided

~All Ages. 21+ to drink

~Outside entertainment is welcome.

~TV, Stereo , PA system and microphones provided.

~Pet friendly for friendly pets.

~Bathroom is Not handicap accessible.

~There is handicap parking and part of the venue is handicap accessible


Located at 133 East Main Street, Westminster, Maryland, 21157, Suite 1.

Call Us at 443-201-9570 and follow or join us on Facebook, Instagram, or Discord for news on upcoming events or releases!

Hours of Operation:
Monday - Closed
Tuesday - 2:00pm to 7:00pm
Wednesday - 2:00pm to 10:00pm
Thursday - 2:00pm to 10:00pm
Friday - 12:00pm to 10:00pm
Saturday - 12:00pm to 10:00pm
Sunday - 12:00pm to 7:00pm

Photos and code courtesy of Charlie McGraw
